We DESIGN the Impossible

We BUILD Tomorrows

We FABRICATE Resilience

Project Management | Waterproofing | Structural Repairs | Civil Maintenance

Know Us

We are SOM (SOLUTIONS OUR MOTTO), a young firm backed by some of the most brilliant minds in the civil engineering industry. Established in 2006, we harnessed our collective capabilities to make infrastructural improvements. Slowly but surely, our professional team and solid reputation both were on the upward swing. And rest, as they say, is good karma.


If you ask us, Civil Engineering is more like poetry in motion where dreamers of our tribe craft the landscape of a place block by block. Take a look at the world's infrastructure, and all of them stem from a singular thought process that implied it was impossible.

Services

We understand the importance of innovation and professionalism and work with the best people to achieve this..

Structural Audit & Repairs

Every building faces wear and tear with time. Hence the health assessment of existing structures, particularly those over 30 years of age, is imperative. We conduct in-depth structural audits that assess building strength and recommend subsequent maintenance and repairs.

Waterproofing

As a coastal city, water seepage comes with the territory of heavy rainfall and annual floods. Additionally, the hydrostatic pressure exerted by a high water table causes structural damage and moisture-related problems.

Building Repair & Restoration

No matter how mighty, all structures need to improve their ability to withstand wear and tear over time. Repair and restoration services to reinforce the load-bearing of a building within the architectural framework require different expertise.

Project Survey and Estimation

Undertaking any project, be it new construction or an existing organisational repair and restructuring, requires excellent planning. Before the planning comes the stage of involving a trustworthy partner to handhold via an honest property evaluation.

Painting

Most folks don't realise that painting a structure is more about protection than beautification. It prevents the oxidation and corrosion of external surfaces and adds shelf life to the property.

Project Management

Most projects fail or fall back due to a lack of proper management. SOM excels in such seamless organisation that irrespective of the hierarchy, systems are followed.

Building Construction

No matter where you go, it's the cityscape that adds character to a place. Be it the pink architecture of Jaipur, the sky caressing facades of Mumbai or the ostentatious kothis of Delhi, they all have their own identity.

Fabrication

Structural steel fabrication involves the moulding of steel to design highly stable and durable edifices in construction. Structural steel is malleable, cost-effective and recyclable and hence holds immense value.

Interior Designing and Contracting

Spaces must be functional and safe in addition to their pleasing aesthetics. Optimum space utilisation within soothing colour palettes and matching elementary dynamics is a given.

Civil Maintenance

Every structure is subject to wear and tear over time. Like everything else, it calls for regular maintenance and repairs to maintain building health and longevity.

Landscaping

Landscaping engineering allows for planning and designing spaces to maximise their utility and potential. It is the application of mathematics and science to the overall ecosystem to create symbiotic living areas.

Turnkey Contracting

Expertise, efficiency and economics drive successful Turnkey Projects. An ideal Turnkey Contractor runs a tight ship from project ideation to execution. At SOM Civil, we understand that budgets are equally crucial as design outlook. We combine our skills and technology to offer the best-in-market solutions within realistic timelines. We are proud that our clients choose us for the holistic solutions we provide.

Our Work

SUKHADA CONDOMINIUM

OM SHANTI

Vipul Pandya

We were delighted to have M/s SOM Civil Engineers carry out our building civil work. It was an entire overhaul of the premises, and we were happy with the result. The services included the waterproofing of the terrace, plaster patchwork, texturised painting, plumbing and beautification. We wholeheartedly recommend their services.

Shreeji Kiran Co-op Hsg Soc. Ltd., Vile Parle (East), Mumbai

Mrs K. N. Behere

After much research for an ideal organisation, we gave M/s SOM Civil Engineers the contract for our society repair work. Our society needed significant structural repairs, slab recasting, painting, plumbing, installing new tanks on the terrace, and intense waterproofing work. The contractors needed to be on the same page as us. We are happy to state that Team SOM carried out every aspect as promised and delivered more than they promised. We are pleased to endorse their services.

Navprabhat Co-Op Hsg Soc. Ltd., Vile Parle (East), Mumbai

Mr Bharat Shah

M/s. SOM Civil engineers completed the terrace waterproofing (approx 30,000 sq.ft. Area) and external civil repair work (approx 70,000 sq. Ft) work to our satisfaction. As committed, they carried the repair work within the stipulated budget of Rs 2 crore and a timeframe of one year. The quality was A Plus, and we recommend their services for commercial buildings.

Tex Centre Premises Co-Op Society Ltd.

Mr Sudhir Putli

M/s. SOM Civil Engineers were entrusted with the crucial task of carrying out structural repairs, plumbing and painting work for five buildings in our society. The order value was approximately Rs 41.3 lakh. SOM not only completed the tasks as per the agreed tender terms and within the specified time frame but also went beyond their call of duty to find long-term solutions to our perennial leakage problems.

Talmakiwadi Co-Op Hsg Soc Ltd, Tardeo, Mumbai

Mr Suresh Khanolkar

M/s. SOM Civil has successfully carried out our society repair and restoration within record time. The scope included structural repairs, plumbing and painting work totalling an order value of Rs 2.46 crores. We are impressed with their stringent quality checks and recommend their restoration services as a one-stop solution.

Prathamesh Co-Op Hsg Soc Ltd, Prabhadevi, Mumbai
